border.$description: Status Bar border color separating the Status Bar and editor

debuggingBackground.$description: Status Bar background color when a program is being debugged

debuggingForeground.$description: Status Bar foreground color when a program is being debugged

debuggingBorder.$description: Status Bar border color separating the Status Bar and editor when debugging

noFolderBackground.$description: Status Bar background color when no folder is opened

noFolderForeground.$description: Status Bar foreground color when no folder is opened

noFolderBorder.$description: Status Bar border color separating the Status Bar and editor when no folder is opened

activeBackground.$description: Status Bar item background color when clicking

hoverBackground.$description: Status Bar item background color when hovering

prominentBackground.$description: Status Bar prominent items background color

prominentForeground.$description: Status Bar prominent items foreground color

remoteBackground.$description: Background color for the remote indicator on the status bar

remoteForeground.$description: Foreground color for the remote indicator on the status bar
